title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates family as a Curriculum Developer in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates:
NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates!
